faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Annadale?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Annadale typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your home, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. Smaller homes or spot treatments start around $800, while whole-house treatments for larger properties or severe infestations can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in my Annadale home?
faqs.answer: Common termite signs include mud tubes along foundation walls, hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows or doors, small holes in drywall, and sagging floors or ceilings. Annadale homeowners should also watch for termite swarms in spring, particularly in older homes near wooded areas. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for a professional inspection.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Annadale?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Annadale are completed in one day, typically taking 4-8 hours depending on your home's size and the treatment method used. Liquid barrier treatments require drilling and trenching around your foundation, while bait systems involve installing monitoring stations. Follow-up inspections are scheduled 30-90 days after initial treatment to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite treatment warranties in Annadale?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive warranties with all termite treatments in Annadale, typically ranging from 1-5 years depending on the treatment plan selected. Our warranties include annual inspections and free re-treatment if termites return during the warranty period. We also offer renewable protection plans to keep your Staten Island home continuously protected against future infestations.
